channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How Climate Change Is Fueling Extremism in North-Eastern Kenya and What Solutions Are Needed
item.description: This article explains how climate change is increasingly contributing to violent extremism in north-eastern Kenya, especially in areas like Garissa and Wajir. The authors show that climate-related sho...

item.title: Government Success in Fighting Mineral Smuggling Boosts Tanzania’s Resources
item.description: In Tanzania, government efforts to tackle mineral smuggling have started showing significant results. Minister for Minerals, Anthony Mavunde, announced that between July 2025 and March 2026, authoriti...

item.title: Cape Town Points to Justice System Shortcomings Amid Ongoing Crime
item.description: Cape Town is facing ongoing violence on the Cape Flats despite significant investment in local safety and security. The city has allocated R6.8 billion for the 2026/27 fiscal year to its Safety and Se...

item.title: Imelda Schweighart refutes claims she was removed from Miss Universe Philippines
item.description: Imelda Schweighart has publicly denied circulating claims that she was allegedly kicked out of the Miss Universe Philippines competition, calling such reports “fake news.” The beauty queen, who has pr...

item.title: Court sentences Nitesh Rane to one month jail for 2019 assault on NHAI engineer
item.description: Nearly seven years after a controversial incident in Maharashtra, BJP MLA Nitesh Rane has been sentenced to one month in jail by a Sindhudurg court for assaulting a public servant. The case relates to...

item.title: Maharashtra Man Stabs Guards After Forcing Kalma Recitation, Linked to ISIS Aspirations
item.description: A shocking incident unfolded in Maharashtra's Thane district on April 27, 2026, when a 31-year-old man, Jabar Zubair Ansari, allegedly stabbed two security guards in Mira Road's Naya Nagar area near M...

item.title: Kisii University Student Shares CCTV Footage of Thief Stealing Clothes at 1:52 AM
item.description: A student at Kisii University known as MC Edu Vandaruor got a rude shock after checking his CCTV footage. While he was in town at night putting up posters for a campus event, a man sneaked into his co...

item.title: Christopher Harborne: The billionaire behind Nigel Farage’s political funding
item.description: Christopher Harborne, a highly private billionaire, has emerged as the principal financial supporter of Nigel Farage and his political parties, providing approximately two-thirds of Reform UK's fundin...

item.title: Jawed Naqvi critiques Indian nationalist cinema through Dhurandhar film
item.description: In his column, senior journalist Jawed Naqvi from Delhi discusses the Indian movie Dhurandhar, which he calls the poor man’s version of Hollywood’s Rambo. The film features a brooding Indian hero who ...

item.title: Families of missing persons call on Supreme Court to enforce existing writs
item.description: Families of desaparecidos, or individuals who have gone missing under unresolved or suspicious circumstances, are appealing to the Supreme Court for the strict enforcement of writs previously issued i...

item.title: Pasig City shuts down hotel linked to alleged human trafficking activities
item.description: Naglabas ng closure order ang lokal na pamahalaan ng Pasig laban sa isang hotel na iniulat na may kaugnayan kay dating mambabatas Mike Defensor, kasunod ng mga alegasyon ng human trafficking at prosti...

item.title: Manchester United's Charity Shirt at Brentford Match Explained
item.description: Manchester United's 2-1 victory over Brentford on April 27, 2026, was notable not only for the crucial points towards qualifying for the Champions League, but also because of the unique shirts worn by...

item.title: Top Billing Returns to SABC3 with Fresh Format and New Presenters
item.description: After a six-year break, the iconic South African lifestyle show, Top Billing, is making a comeback to SABC3 on Thursday, April 28, 2026. Media mogul and executive producer Basetsana Kumalo describes t...

item.title: Ruto Affirms Government Commitment to Universal Health Coverage Amid Interference Attempts
item.description: President William Ruto has reiterated Kenya’s commitment to achieving universal health coverage (UHC) through the establishment of the Social Health Authority. Speaking in Nairobi, Ruto described heal...

item.title: Health inspectors shut down Angel Stadium concession area after evidence of rodent activity
item.description: A health inspection at Angel Stadium in Anaheim revealed a rodent infestation that led to the temporary shutdown of a concession stand in Section 432. According to Orange County Public Health Services...

item.title: 14 killed and 84 injured in Jakarta train collision, rescue operation completed
item.description: A tragic train collision occurred near Jakarta, Indonesia, late on Monday in Bekasi, just outside the capital. The incident involved a commuter train colliding with a taxi on the tracks, followed by a...

item.title: Top Actuarial Science Graduate Celebrated by Community After Securing Insurance Internship
item.description: A young woman identified as Blessings Phiry has become the talk of her town after graduating top of her class in Actuarial Science and securing a paid internship with Prudential Insurance. Her achieve...

item.title: Kenya Opposition Strategies Ahead of 2027 Presidential Election
item.description: On Tuesday, April 28, Kenyan newspapers reported extensively on political manoeuvres ahead of the 2027 presidential elections. Rigathi Gachagua and Kalonzo Musyoka are leading the United Opposition in...

item.title: Maciej Sidorowicz Captures Everyday Scenes with Light and Atmosphere
item.description: Warsaw-based artist Maciej Sidorowicz creates digital artworks that evoke the sensibility of plein air painting, turning ordinary urban and suburban spaces into studies of light, mood, and atmosphere....

item.title: Witnessing the Reality of Forced Deportations on a UK Flight
item.description: At Gatwick Airport, a tense scene unfolded aboard a flight as security forces attempted to forcibly deport a man. The chaotic confrontation, which included a group of security guards struggling to res...
